Dharma. (2) The same result is achieved if the lord of the
depression sign or the planet that is exalted in that Sign is in a

RAJAYOGAS 169
Kendra from the Lagna or the Moon; (3) if the two planets
mentioned in (1) are mutually in Kendra positions; (4) if the
planet in depression is aspected by the lord of that sign; (5) if
the planet in depression is in a Kendra with respect to the
Lagna or the Moon; (6) if the lord of the Navamsa of the
depressed planet be in a Kendra or Kona, and if the ascendant
be a movable Sign or if the lord of the ascendant be in a movable
Sign or AriiSa. (7) If Jupiter be depressed in the Lagna, and
the 8th house he occupied by a malefic, and if the Navamsa of
the Bth house be one owned by that malefic; and (8) if two, three
or four planets in depression occupy benefic 1/60 portions or
their exaltation Navamsas, the person will become a great
sovereign.

CHAPTER XIV
ISSUE
Birth of worthy children is the legitimate object of marriage
